Gold and Silver Price Forecast – Fed Hawkish Signal Pressures Metals

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra Gold (UGL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg Gold Subindex index. The fund provides 2x the daily performance of gold, as measured by the price of COMEX gold futures contracts. UGL was launched on Dec 1, 2008 and is issued by ProShares.

data.text: The ongoing US-Iran ceasefire amid Iran-Israel tensions allowed gold and silver to focus on technical levels. Gold retested $4,172 support while silver traded at $65.24.

data.title: Gold and Silver Price Forecast – Fed Hawkish Signal Pressures Metals
data.text: Gold and silver remain under pressure as the Fed's hawkish signal supports the US dollar and Treasury yields, while the US-Iran peace agreement may limit downside risks.

data.title: Gold Falls as Hawkish Fed Outweighs U.S.-Iran Deal Relief
data.text: Gold fell in early Asian trade. The precious metal's price is being weighed down by a more hawkish Fed outweighing relief from the U.S.-Iran interim peace deal, ANZ said.
